name: Oatmeal Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Lightly grease 12 muffin cups or use paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, combine oatmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. In another bowl, mix milk, vegetable oil, and beaten egg.
5. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Fold in blueberries.
7. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
8. In a small bowl, combine 2 tablespoons sugar and 2 teaspoons cinnamon.
9. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture over the muffins.
10. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the cups. (These can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Store in an airtight container). Serve warm or at room temperature.
